positive: Minimalist celestial guardian spirit, highly detailed graphic design, centered composition, abstract silhouette of a stylized creature combining elements of a soaring raven and a crescent moon, rendered with bioluminescent ink effects on a deep midnight blue background. The creature should have crystalline edges, dynamic negative space, and appear majestic and ethereal. Style: Art Nouveau meets sacred geometry, clean vector lines, high contrast, vibrant glow accents (cyan, gold, violet). Lighting: Dramatic, radial spotlight effect emphasizing the form. Print-friendly, designed for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: text, blurry, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, cluttered, realistic, photo, watermark, extra limbs
